title: ConditionRequest
description: ConditionRequest: IRequest that filters all elements that meet a given condition.

Condition.description: Condition for the elements to be met in order not to be filtered out. ICondition: Top level interface for conditions: lightweight objects describing a yes/no question to be asked against another object.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
